Thanks for the PR. A few quick checks before you submit.

Voice rules: ASCII only, no AI-spam phrases, WHY-led prose. See CONTRIBUTING.md.
-->

## What

One-line summary of the change.

## Why

The reason this change exists. What was broken / missing / suboptimal? Link to issue / advisory / regression if applicable.

## Test plan

- [ ] Unit tests pass locally
- [ ] CI green (security scans, lint, build)
- [ ] Manually verified: ...

## Breaking changes

- [ ] No breaking changes
- [ ] Breaking change in: ...

## Related

- Closes #
- Refs #
